summary: Adds multi-series summary analysis and sharper onboarding for LLM-driven reserve workflows.
highlights: New reserve analyze summary --by-series mode for grouped per-series summaries
Batched obs get workflows now pair cleanly with multi-series summary analysis
Pipeline layer now supports grouped JSONL observation reading by series_id
Bare reserve onboard is now a concise routing brief for LLMs
Onboarding content now highlights batched multi-series obs get usage much more explicitly
Topic onboarding was trimmed to avoid duplicate command catalogs in the base program payload
update_instructions: Download the latest release from the GitHub releases page or rerun the install script from download.reservecli.dev.
